metadata.description: A community-maintained, open collection of Claude skills for UX, AI, writing, and design work. Browse and install at https://kaustavr19.github.io/claude-skills/

plugins.name: anti-ai-slop
plugins.description: Reduces AI slop in writing — cuts hedging, filler, and generic phrasing.

plugins.name: article-formatter
plugins.description: Full-stack article formatting assistant for LinkedIn, Medium, Substack, and more.

plugins.name: competitive-benchmark
plugins.description: Benchmark a brand's website against named competitors and synthesise a strategic direction.

plugins.name: market-intelligence
plugins.description: Strategic market intelligence brief — trends, audience, competitor deep-dives, and edge synthesis.

plugins.name: ux-audit
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX audit across six frameworks with optional deep behavioural lenses.

plugins.name: visual-aesthetics-audit
plugins.description: Critique the visual aesthetics of any UI from screenshots or URLs, with specific fix values.
